languages.text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн фокусируется на вас.{/n} "У меня есть просьба — мне нужно подготовиться перед этим путешествием. До того как я присоединился к духовенству Алтаря-Темплум-Экс-17, у меня была небольшая лаборатория в системе Авиорус. Мне пришлось покинуть ее в спешке ради собственной безопасности, и там остались важные образцы и записи о моих опытах. Если мы хотим помочь Нунциусу, нам нужно их забрать".

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."
languages.original_text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн фокусируется на вас.{/n} "У меня есть просьба — мне нужно подготовиться перед этим путешествием. До того как я присоединился к духовенству Алтаря-Темплум-Экс-17, у меня была небольшая лаборатория в системе Авиорус. Мне пришлось покинуть ее в спешке ради собственной безопасности, и там остались важные образцы и записи о моих опытах. Если мы хотим помочь Нунциусу, нам нужно их забрать".

Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

languages.text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn vuelve a dirigirte su atención.{/n} «Tengo una petición, necesito prepararme para el viaje. Antes de unirme al clero de Altar-Templum-Ext-17, tenía un pequeño laboratorio en el sistema Aviorus. Me vi obligado a abandonarlo apresuradamente para salvar mi vida, dejando atrás muestras vitales y registros de mi experimento. Si vamos a ayudar a Nuncius, necesitaremos recuperarlos».
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn vuelve a dirigirte su atención.{/n} «Tengo una petición, necesito prepararme para el viaje. Antes de unirme al clero de Altar-Templum-Ext-17, tenía un pequeño laboratorio en el sistema Aviorus. Me vi obligado a abandonarlo apresuradamente para salvar mi vida, dejando atrás muestras vitales y registros de mi experimento. Si vamos a ayudar a Nuncius, necesitaremos recuperarlos».

languages.text: {n}犹豫片刻后，伊奥贡将注意力重新转向你。{/n}“我有个请求——出发前我得做好准备。在加入卡利西斯祭坛17号前，我在艾维罗斯星系有个小实验室。为了自保，我离开得很匆忙，重要的实验样本和记录都遗落在了那里。如果我们要救努恩修斯，就必须把它们拿回来。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

traits.locale_text: {n}犹豫片刻后，伊奥贡将注意力重新转向你。{/n}“我有个请求——出发前我得做好准备。在加入卡利西斯祭坛17号前，我在艾维罗斯星系有个小实验室。为了自保，我离开得很匆忙，重要的实验样本和记录都遗落在了那里。如果我们要救努恩修斯，就必须把它们拿回来。”

languages.text: {n}Après un moment d'hésitation, Eogunn vous accorde à nouveau son attention.{/n} « J'ai une requête à vous présenter, car ce voyage nécessite des préparatifs. Avant de rejoindre le clergé d'Altar-Templum-Ext-17, j'avais un petit laboratoire dans le système d'Aviorus. J'ai été contraint de le quitter à la hâte par mesure de sécurité, en y laissant d'importants échantillons et des registres de mes recherches. Si nous voulons aider Nuncius, il faut les récupérer. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après un moment d'hésitation, Eogunn vous accorde à nouveau son attention.{/n} « J'ai une requête à vous présenter, car ce voyage nécessite des préparatifs. Avant de rejoindre le clergé d'Altar-Templum-Ext-17, j'avais un petit laboratoire dans le système d'Aviorus. J'ai été contraint de le quitter à la hâte par mesure de sécurité, en y laissant d'importants échantillons et des registres de mes recherches. Si nous voulons aider Nuncius, il faut les récupérer. »

languages.text: {n}Bir anlık tereddütten sonra Eogunn, dikkatini tekrar sana veriyor.{/n} "Bir ricam var. Bu yolculuktan önce hazırlanmam gerekiyor. Altar-Templum-Ext-17 rahipliğine katılmadan önce Aviorus Sistemi'nde küçük bir laboratuvarım vardı. Kendi güvenliğim için orayı aceleyle terk etmek zorunda kaldım, önemli numunelerle deneylerimin kayıtları orada kaldı. Nuncius'a yardım etmek istiyorsak onları geri almalıyız."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir anlık tereddütten sonra Eogunn, dikkatini tekrar sana veriyor.{/n} "Bir ricam var. Bu yolculuktan önce hazırlanmam gerekiyor. Altar-Templum-Ext-17 rahipliğine katılmadan önce Aviorus Sistemi'nde küçük bir laboratuvarım vardı. Kendi güvenliğim için orayı aceleyle terk etmek zorunda kaldım, önemli numunelerle deneylerimin kayıtları orada kaldı. Nuncius'a yardım etmek istiyorsak onları geri almalıyız."

languages.text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern wendet Eogunn sich wieder dir zu.{/n} "Ich habe eine Bitte. Ich muss mich auf diese Reise vorbereiten. Bevor ich zum Klerus von Altar-Templum-Ext-17 stieß, hatte ich ein kleines Laboratorium im Aviorus-System. Ich musste es aus Sicherheitsgründen eilig verlassen und wichtige Proben und Aufzeichnungen meiner Experimente zurücklassen. Wenn wir Nuncius helfen wollen, müssen wir sie bergen."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern wendet Eogunn sich wieder dir zu.{/n} "Ich habe eine Bitte. Ich muss mich auf diese Reise vorbereiten. Bevor ich zum Klerus von Altar-Templum-Ext-17 stieß, hatte ich ein kleines Laboratorium im Aviorus-System. Ich musste es aus Sicherheitsgründen eilig verlassen und wichtige Proben und Aufzeichnungen meiner Experimente zurücklassen. Wenn wir Nuncius helfen wollen, müssen wir sie bergen."

languages.text: {n}しばらくの逡巡の後、エオガンはあなたに視線を戻す。{/n}「この旅の前に準備が必要だ。オルター＝テンプラム＝エクスト17の聖職者になる前、私はアビオラス星系に小さな研究室を持っていた。私は身の安全のために急遽そこを離れることを余儀なくされ、重要なサンプルと実験の記録がそこに残っていた。ヌンキウスを助けたいのなら、それらを取り戻さなければならない」
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."
